subject: URGENT: Voter Slip Distribution
message: All Booth Coordinators must ensure that 100% of voter slips are distributed by tomorrow evening. Please assign tasks to your volunteers immediately and verify through the Task Board.

subject: Missing House Numbers in Sector 4
message: We are unable to locate 15 households in Sector 4 block B. The address mappings seem incorrect. Need guidance on how to proceed.

subject: End of Day Status
message: Covered 120 households today. Encountered resistance at 2 houses due to local disputes. Will re-attempt tomorrow with senior volunteers.
